overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game, showing a red-haired character exploring a rocky alien shoreline with turquoise water pools. The character walks past a crashed X-wing starfighter and approaches ancient stone ruins carved into cliff faces, with atmospheric haze and bright natural lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky alien plateau overlooking turquoise water pools

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across uneven rocky terrain toward the edge of a plateau

entered.detail: uneven grey rock surface with scattered stones and cracks
vibrant blue-green water pool visible in the distance below the plateau
tall grey rock cliff with layered geological formations

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a barren rocky plateau under bright sunlight. Turquoise water pools are visible in the distance below the cliff edge, and layered rock formations rise ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with crashed starship wreckage

events.description: crashed X-wing starfighter comes into clear view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching the crashed starship while walking along the rocky shoreline

entered.detail: red and white starfighter wreckage with s-foils closed resting on the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the rocky shore as a crashed X-wing starfighter becomes prominent on the right. The terrain slopes gently downward toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow shoreline water with ancient ruins ahead

events.description: descending from dry rocky terrain into shallow turquoise water along the shore
ancient stone temple structure with wide staircase becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow turquoise water along the shoreline toward ancient ruins

entered.detail: large carved stone structure with columns embedded in the cliff face
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
twisted tree with purple foliage growing from the rocky outcrop

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow turquoise water and walks along the shoreline. The crashed ship falls behind as an ancient stone temple with a grand staircase comes into view ahead, alongside a distinctive purple alien tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple waterfront with carved entrance

events.description: walking deeper into shallow water approaching the temple staircase

agents.ego_description: continuing through shallow water past the temple staircase, looking toward the canyon ahead

entered.detail: dark rectangular doorway carved into the stone cliff face with ornate borders

segments.scene_description: The character wades through the shallow water passing close to the ancient temple stairs and carved entrance. The purple alien tree becomes prominent on the left as the view opens toward a distant rocky canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a barren alien plateau that gradually descends into a coastal ruin. It begins with the character walking across a sunlit rocky plateau, where layered rock formations rise ahead and turquoise pools shimmer in the distance below the cliff edge. As the terrain slopes gently downward toward the shore, a crashed X-wing starfighter emerges prominently on the right. The scene then shifts as the character enters the shallow turquoise water, leaving the wreckage behind to approach an ancient stone temple with a grand staircase and a distinctive purple alien tree. Finally, the camera wades closer to the temple's carved entrance and the vibrant purple foliage before the view opens wide toward a distant rocky canyon.
